summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified - Role-based dashboard visibility issue for non-admin users (CS agents, Sales agents, Team Leaders) has been fixed. All 19 backend tests passed. All 5 frontend role-specific tests passed via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 for super_admin (previously working)
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 for sales_executive (FIX VERIFIED - was 403)
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 for team_leader (previously working)
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 for cs_agent (FIX VERIFIED - was 403)
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/stats returns individual stats for cs_agent with head_commission=0
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/stats returns team stats with head_commission visible for cs_head
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/agent-revenue returns data for cs_agent
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/leaderboard returns 5 agents
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/monthly-trend returns data for cs_head
Backend: /api/dashboard/filtered-stats returns data for sales_executive
Backend: /api/dashboard/filtered-stats returns team data for team_leader
Backend: /api/dashboard/team-revenue returns team data
Backend: /api/dashboard/leaderboard returns data
Backend: /api/dashboard/lead-funnel returns data
Backend: CS agent (della@clt-academy.com) authenticates with role cs_agent
Backend: CS head (falja@clt-academy.com) authenticates with role cs_head
Backend: Sales agent (aleesha@clt-academy.com) authenticates with role sales_executive
Backend: Team leader (mohammed@clt-academy.com) authenticates with role team_leader
Backend: Super admin (aqib@clt-academy.com) authenticates with role super_admin
Frontend: CS Agent dashboard loads at /cs/dashboard - shows AED 105,778 revenue, 51 upgrades, 5 agents in leaderboard
Frontend: CS Agent - Head Commission card correctly HIDDEN
Frontend: CS Agent - Total Commission card correctly HIDDEN
Frontend: CS Agent - Individual/Team toggle correctly HIDDEN
Frontend: CS Head dashboard loads at /cs/dashboard - shows AED 307,370 revenue (team), 147 upgrades
Frontend: CS Head - Head Commission card VISIBLE (AED 4,500)
Frontend: CS Head - Total Commission card VISIBLE (AED 22,125)
Frontend: CS Head - Individual/Team toggle VISIBLE
Frontend: CS Head - 5 agents shown in leaderboard
Frontend: Sales Agent dashboard loads at /sales/dashboard - shows AED 262,955 revenue, 99 deals, 249 leads
Frontend: Sales Agent - Top 10 Agents chart NOW SHOWS DATA (was 'No data' before fix)
Frontend: Sales Agent - Team-wise Revenue chart shows data
Frontend: Team Leader dashboard loads at /sales/dashboard - shows AED 1,012,216 revenue (~1M), 413 deals
Frontend: Team Leader - Drill-down descriptions VISIBLE ('Click any bar to see...')
Frontend: Admin Sales dashboard loads with full unrestricted data
Frontend: Admin CS dashboard loads with Head Commission visible and toggle available

fix_verification.root_cause: The /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings endpoint was restricted to admin/manager roles only, returning 403 for sales agents and CS agents. Frontend used Promise.all which caused the entire dashboard to fail when any API returned an error.
fix_applied: Backend: Changed sales-agent-closings endpoint from require_roles(['super_admin', 'admin', 'sales_manager']) to get_current_user (all authenticated users)
Frontend: Changed Promise.all to Promise.allSettled in CSDashboard.jsx and SalesDashboard.jsx to gracefully handle partial API failures
fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All roles can now access dashboards with appropriate data visibility

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly addresses the P0 issue - role-based dashboard visibility
Promise.allSettled pattern is appropriate for handling multiple independent API calls
Head Commission card visibility correctly respects role hierarchy (hidden for cs_agent, visible for cs_head/admin)
Drill-down descriptions correctly respect canDrillDown flag based on isManagerOrAbove
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix for role-based dashboard visibility verified. Key endpoints tested: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings (now open to all authenticated users), /api/cs/dashboard/stats (with view_mode parameter for individual/team). CS Dashboard at /cs/dashboard, Sales Dashboard at /sales/dashboard. Test users: CS Agent (della), CS Head (falja), Sales Agent (aleesha), Team Leader (mohammed), Super Admin (aqib). All dashboards now load correctly for their respective roles with appropriate data filtering and UI element visibility.
testing_method: Backend pytest (19 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
